basic_details.job_title: IIEST Shibpur Senior Assistant Recruitment 2026 - Apply Offline
basic_details.organization_name: Indian Institute of Engineering Science and Technology, Shibpur (IIEST Shibpur)
basic_details.short_information: Indian Institute of Engineering Science and Technology, Shibpur (IIEST Shibpur) Senior Assistant Notification 2026 has been released on 06 May 2026 on the official website of IIEST Shibpur. A total of 5 vacancies have been announced through the IIEST Shibpur Senior Assistant Recruitment 2026. Candidates with Senior Secondary (10+2) qualification, proficiency in Computer Word Processing and Spread Sheet, and 5 years regular service as Junior Assistant or equivalent are eligible to apply for these Senior Assistant vacancies. The offline application process for IIEST Shibpur Senior Assistant Recr

age_limit.details: Not applicable for promotees. Relaxable for Departmental Candidates upto five years.

qualification.details: At least 5 years regular service as Junior Assistant in PB-1 GP 2000 or 5 years combined service of Office Attendant (SG-II) and Junior Assistant in PB-1 GP 2000. Senior Secondary (10+2) qualification. Proficiency in Computer Word Processing and Spread Sheet.

selection_process: DPC Working Performance Record (APAR) Prescribed Test Interview
how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for IIEST Shibpur Senior Assistant Recruitment 2026 through offline mode should follow the steps below.
Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Download the application form from the official website: .
Fill the application form carefully with correct information.
Attach self-attested copies of required documents such as photograph, signature, ID proof, and certificates.
Check all details carefully before submission.
Send the completed application form to the address mentioned in the notification through Speed Post / Registered Post or as instructed.
Ensure the application reaches before the last date: 26-05-2026.
Keep a photocopy of the submitted application form for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the IIEST Shibpur Senior Assistant position?
faq.answer: The last date to submit the application for the Senior Assistant position at IIEST Shibpur is 26 May 2026. Ensure your application reaches before this deadline.

faq.question: Q2. How many vacancies are available for the Senior Assistant post?
faq.answer: There are a total of 5 vacancies for the Senior Assistant post announced by IIEST Shibpur in this recruitment drive.

faq.question: Q3. What is the educational qualification required for the Senior Assistant role?
faq.answer: Candidates must have completed Senior Secondary (10+2) and possess proficiency in Computer Word Processing and Spread Sheet. Additionally, 5 years of service as Junior Assistant or equivalent is required.

faq.question: Q4. What is the salary offered for the Senior Assistant position?
faq.answer: The selected candidates for the Senior Assistant post will receive a salary in the pay band of Rs. 5200 - 20200 with a Grade Pay of Rs. 2400.

faq.question: Q5. Is there any application fee for the IIEST Shibpur Senior Assistant recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for the Senior Assistant recruitment at IIEST Shibpur.

faq.question: Q6. What is the age limit for applying to this post?
faq.answer: The age limit is not applicable for promotees. However, age relaxation is available for Departmental Candidates up to five years.

faq.question: Q7. What is the selection process for the Senior Assistant recruitment?
faq.answer: The selection process includes DPC, Working Performance Record (APAR), a Prescribed Test, and an Interview.

faq.question: Q8. In which mode should the application be submitted?
faq.answer: Applications for the IIEST Shibpur Senior Assistant recruitment must be submitted in offline mode only.

faq.question: Q9. Where is IIEST Shibpur located?
faq.answer: Indian Institute of Engineering Science and Technology, Shibpur is located in Shibpur, West Bengal.

faq.question: Q10. Where can I find the official notification and application form?
faq.answer: The official notification and application form can be downloaded from the official website of IIEST Shibpur. Links are provided in the "Important Links" section.
